wiki.summary: “pain talk” is the third track on Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis. It marks the return of the well-renowned duo of Nettspend and OsamaSon, since the 2024 single “withdrawals”. On the track, the duo raps about their lavish lifestyle, while matching the energy of a heavy, distorted bass instrumental. wiki.content: “pain talk” is the third track on Nettspend’s debut studio album, early life crisis. It marks the return of the well-renowned duo of Nettspend and OsamaSon, since the 2024 single “withdrawals”. On the track, the duo raps about their lavish lifestyle, while matching the energy of a heavy, distorted bass instrumental. On February 6, 2026, Nettspend would start a stream on Twitch, where he previewed a snippet of the track and showed the following: early life crisis? you are not alone call +1 804-ELC-6246 On March 1, 2026, Nettspend would post a short preview of his and OsamaSon’s verses through his secondary Instagram account. Nettspend & ‎OsamaSon released “pain talk” on March 6, 2026. “pain talk” by Nettspend & ‎OsamaSon was produced by Rok, gyro, skai & Warren Hunter. Read more on Last.fm.
